reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Tiene un problema para llegar si uno viene de Mendoza. No depende del ACA pero deberían gestionar una solución, creo que es tema de la municipalidad

(Translated by Google)
Good service. It's difficult to get there if you're coming from Mendoza. It's not under the ACA's jurisdiction, but they should work on a solution; I think it's a matter for the municipality.
